criteria.description: Uses stress, sleep, fitness, food, travel mood, crowd, budget and season.
Avoids medical claims and includes conservative safety boundaries.
Intensity matches stress, sleep, fitness and risk flags.
Uses portion, protein, vegetables/fiber, spice/sugar caution without medical claims.
Uses Chiang Rai database and explains local context.
Connects local providers/community without fake partnerships.
Labels unknowns and does not invent places.
